name: Luffy
content: What a nice nap that was. I'm Luffy and I'm hungry! Now where am I?
Eh, there's someone in the barrel? I'm -0-. This is Alvida's pirate ship and I'm here to defeat her.

name: Coby
content: Ah! Don't beat me... My name is Coby, a caretaker serving Alvida, but I want to escape! I just don't have the guts to do it…

name: Luffy
content: Well, how about you help me find some food then run away with me when I'm full?

name: Coby
content: No way...My legs will tremble whenever I think I'll be captured by Alvida...

name: Pirate Swordsman
content: Hey! Who's hiding there?!

name: Luffy
content: You're pretty stupid and useless, and you seem kinda wimpy, Coby. I don't like you.

name: Coby
content: (So direct...) Er... So, Luffy, why are you sailing?

name: Luffy
content: Me? Hehe... I want to become the Pirate King!

name: Coby
content: Are you telling me you're looking for the greatest treasure in the world, the [One Piece]? Aren't you scared?

name: Luffy
content: This is my dream, so I wouldn't even mind dying for it!
(He's thinking the same thing as me...)

name: Coby
content: If I'm willing to die...Will I accomplish it...? Will I be able... to become a Marine? I...I want to arrest Alvida!!

name: Luffy
content: Hurry up, Coby! Let's find the villagers.

name: Coby
content: Lu...Luffy, are you serious? What if Alvida finds out...

name: Luffy
content: You're such a coward, Coby. Don't worry, we're here. Alvida won't dare bully you again.

name: Peppoko
content: Hey! Who's there!

name: Coby
content: Shoot, we're done for!

name: Luffy
content: What are you afraid of, Coby? -0- , let's go!
No problem!

name: Luffy
content: Are the Alvida pirates all as weak as this? That's boring!

name: Coby
content: Eh...Luffy, you're really strong.
Luffy, I found the captured villagers. Let's escort them back to the village first.

name: Luffy
content: Hey Coby, where's Alvida? I'm starving...I need meat!

name: Coby
content: The storage room is right over there. Maybe we can find some food there.
Someone's here!

name: Heppoko
content: Who are you, boy? How dare you intrude on the Alvida Pirates' ship!

name: Luffy
content: Don't stop me from eating meat!

name: Luffy
content: Great, done! Now which one shall I choose...I'll start with this!
Luffy, be quick. We still need to deal with Alvida.

name: Luffy
content: Mmmm...Okay....

name: Rene
content: Wait, -0- . Let me join you!
Great! We can save a lot of time with Miss Rene here.

name: Rene
content: Fufufu, I'm a rather skilled swordsman. My skill can greatly decrease an enemy's attack, so leave the defense to me!
What a relief. Thanks for your help, Rene!

name: Alvida
content: Who did you say you are going to arrest, Coby? Did you think you can escape from me?

name: Luffy
content: Coby, tell her who you're going to arrest!

name: Coby
content: I...I'll become a Marine and arrest you, you fat and ugly hag!!!

name: Luffy
content: Haha!

name: Alvida
content: (Angry) Do you know what you're saying?! You're dead, you brat!

name: Luffy
content: Coby, get behind me. Let me deal with this "fat and ugly hag"!

name: Heppoko
content: His arm extended...Captain Alvida was beaten...

name: Luffy
content: Prepare a boat for us. Coby wants to join the Marines, so stay out of his way!

name: Heppoko
content: Y...Yes

name: Coby
content: You actually ate the Devil Fruit. That's surprising...
Devil Fruit...

name: Coby
content: But, you have to get into the Grand Line if you're looking for the [One Piece]...

name: Luffy
content: Yes, that's why I need friends.
Er...Luffy, can we adventure together?

name: Luffy
content: Sure, you're pretty good! I'm looking for someone in Shells Town, come with me.
Someone... You don't mean the pirate hunter Zoro?

name: Luffy
content: Yup. If he's a good guy, I'd ask him to join me.
You ate the Devil Fruit. You guys seem quite strong.

name: Marine Enforcement Team Leader
content: Invaders!
( Luffy and -0- rescued Zoro successfully) I heard that you're quite strong. Where's your sword?

name: Zoro
content: Taken away by Lieutenant Morgan's bastard son Helmeppo.

name: Luffy
content: Then how about this? I'll get your sword back and then you join me! I'm the man who will become the Pirate King!

name: Zoro
content: A pirate? ...I'll never join you.

name: Zoro
content: Hey...Straw Hat, can you pick that rice roll up for me?

name: Luffy
content: It's all muddy. You want to eat this?!

name: Zoro
content: Shut up.

name: Luffy
content: Give Zoro's swords back!

name: Helmeppo
content: I won't make it easy for you!

name: Luffy
content: Then I'll let you taste my fists!
Ignoring the treasure for some broken swords. What an idiot. Lucky me!

name: Luffy
content: (Luffy got Zoro's sword back) Which one is your sword? I couldn't figure it out, so I brought all three of them.

name: Zoro
content: All three belong to me. I use three swords.

name: Luffy
content: Now will you accept my proposal? Although defying the Marines together with me will make you an outlaw. Or you want to die here?

name: Zoro
content: What a troublesome man...
Anyway, let's go back first. Rika must be worried about us.

name: Commander Ripper
content: You're stronger than I thought… no matter, prepare to die!

name: Marine
content: (Panic with cold sweat) That guy is unbelievable... How did he manage to repel those bullets?!

name: Commander Ripper
content: He doesn't seem normal. He must have eaten some kind of Devil Fruit.

name: Marine
content: Devil fruit? He ate the ocean's secret treasure?

name: Marine
content: Capture him!

name: Zoro
content: You...I'd say you are the offspring of the devil. Anyway, after this incident with the marines, I'll agree to...become a pirate!

name: Zoro
content: But...I have my own ambition!

name: Luffy
content: Yes! You're now one of our companions!
(Sweat) Ambition? What kind of ambition?

name: Zoro
content: I'm going to be the world's greatest swordsman! If you do something that ends up in the way of my goal, I'll have you cut your stomach open to say sorry!

name: Luffy
content: The world's greatest swordsman, good! Since you're the pirate king's crew member, you have to accomplish something like this!

name: Zoro
content: Heh, well said. Good or bad no longer matters as long as my name is known worldwide!

name: Marine
content: Lieutenant...They're too strong. We can't defeat them!

name: Morgan
content: This is an order: Whoever just said that, shoot and kill yourself!

name: Morgan
content: What are you waiting for? Go kill them!

name: Marine
content: (Scared and stepping back) They're too strong. We can't even defeat Zoro alone! Not to mention a man who ate the devil fruit…

name: Morgan
content: Humph, useless trash. I'll kill you myself!

name: Zoro
content: You're someone who only knows how to boast about himself. I'll beat you down in one hit.

name: Coby
content: Morgan has been defeated. Great!

name: Coby
content: Luffy, Zoro, and -0-, thank you all...You give me courage! I'm going to Marine Headquarters with the ship!
Haha. Once you're a marine, please be lenient on us, Coby!

name: Coby
content: (Crying loudly) I'll miss you…

name: Luffy
content: Stop crying. That's why I don't like him. Let's go, -0-, Zoro.

name: Coby
content: (Excited) We'll meet again on the Grand Line someday!

name: Nami
content: Ah, boss, you're finally here to save me.
Huh? Who are you?

name: Pirate Swordsman
content: Hey, hand out the nautical chart!

name: Nami
content: I'm Nami, a thief who only steals treasure from pirates.
Pirate burglar? Why did you steal nautical map? Do you know how to navigate?

name: Nami
content: I'm a navigator. My skill is first class!
Then you can come join in as my navigator.

name: Nami
content: No problem, as long as you take me to find captain Buggy.
Sure, deal!

name: Nami
content: (Nami bound -0- and went to see Buggy) I came into an argument with my boss, so I'll give him to you. Please let me join your crew, Mister Buggy!

name: Buggy
content: Hahaha, sure, I'll let you join my crew…

name: Buggy
content: But first, use this Buggy Cannonball to get rid of your old boss and swear to me your loyalty!

name: Nami
content: Ah...Boss, drink, let's drink. Just ignore that guy.

name: Buggy
content: Nami, are you disobeying my order? Do you want to betray me?

name: Nami
content: Please let me explain!

name: Buggy
content: There's nothing to explain. Mohji, go kill Nami and this boy.

name: Mohji
content: Lying to the great captain Buggy. Go die!

name: Luffy
content: (Luffy and others arrived) -0-, how did you get captured?

name: Nami
content: And you are?
They are my friends. This is Nami, my new navigator!

name: Nami
content: Let me clarify first, I never said I was going to join you.

name: Zoro
content: You're injured -0-. Let's get back to the town first.

name: Cabaji
content: So you are the pirate hunter Zoro. Let's see if you're as strong as they say!

name: Zoro
content: I'd suggest you not. Otherwise you'll die.
Zoro, let me help you.

name: Cabaji
content: Then I'll slay you two together!

name: Pirate Swordsman
content: Ahhh, Mohji and Cabaji are all beaten. Run, everybody!

name: Zoro
content: Cabaji the Acrobat is too weak. Boring!

name: Nami
content: Hey, don't just try to act cool. Let's head back to town and rest before dealing with Buggy next.

name: Luffy
content: That damned red nose!

name: Nami
content: (Frightened) You can't say that name. I know you're strong, but Buggy's not weak either!
Huh, why should we be afraid of that red nose?

name: Zoro
content: Mmmm, that red nose will be a good object for me to test my sword on.

name: Buggy the Clown
content: I heard you talking and I'm really angry! It's time to show you my real strength!

name: Luffy
content: Humph...Red nose, watch out my Gum-Gum Pistol!!

name: Luffy
content: (Luffy's hat was damaged during the fight) I promised Shanks that I would return this hat to him…

name: Nami
content: The hat means so much to you? I can fix it for you, Luffy.

name: Luffy
content: Really? Thank you so much, Nami!

name: Nami
content: Here's your hat.

name: Luffy
content: Awesome!
Nami, would you like to be our navigator?

name: Nami
content: No no, this was just a one-time cooperation. I only like money and oranges!
That's fine. Let's go!

name: Usopp
content: I can't just let people get killed. I'm going to stop these pirates!

name: Nami
content: I didn't know you were this brave.
Well, let us lend you a hand.

name: Usopp
content: I don't need your pity!

name: Zoro
content: I won't fight out of pity!

name: Chief Swordsman
content: You want to stop us? Hahahahaha!

name: Jango
content: You think that is the end? (Jango hypnotizes his crew, increasing their strength.)

name: Luffy
content: Zzzzzzzzz
(Sweat) Shoot, Luffy's been hypnotized too.

name: Zoro
content: That idiot. Never mind, he won't die!

name: Zoro
content: Who are those men?
They are not as strong as people think.

name: Nami
content: Hey! Can't you stop irritating them!

name: Jango
content: Well, I still have a trump card. Get down here, Nyaban Brothers!

name: Buchi
content: Sham, these two guys are strong. You go first.

name: Sham
content: Buchi, I can't do it. You go first.

name: Usopp
content: Hehehe, le me send you home.
Be careful, Usopp. Don't be fooled by their appearance.

name: Buchi
content: Let me show you the real strength of the Nyaban Brothers!

name: Sham
content: Ouch...Buchi, I'm doomed. Captain Kuro will kill us.

name: Buchi
content: Sham, we can't beat them... Better run away!

name: Usopp
content: Stop running, you two! Taste my Marble Shot!
Captain Kuro went to the seashore as the agreed time has passed.

name: Kuro
content: Don't tell me you were stopped by these kids? Since when have the Black Cat Pirates been a bunch of weaklings?!

name: Pirate Swordsman
content: Ca...Captain!

name: Jango
content: Captain, they're not normal kids.

name: Kuro
content: Five minutes! If you can't defeat them in 5 minutes, I'll kill you with my own hands!

name: Zoro
content: I'll finish all of you in less than 5 minutes!
Be careful of his hypnosis. Those pirates no longer feel pain.

name: Jango
content: Seems like I have to do it myself!

name: Nami
content: You guys take care and don't get killed! I'll be leaving now…

name: Luffy
content: Nami, where are you going!

name: Nami
content: (Fierce) My treasure is still on the ship! Hurry and deal with them, I'll go protect my treasure!
(Sweat) That's so like you…

name: Kuro
content: You think you can stop me? My plan will never fail. I don't need trash like this to help me.
Kuro starts to attack his own crew members.

name: Luffy
content: (Angry) This is how you treat your own crew?!
Stop! They're dying!
Kaya and Merry went to the beach and saw everything in disbelief.

name: Kaya
content: Kurahadol...What's all this about? You used to be so gentle...Tell me this isn't true!

name: Merry
content: Miss...

name: Kuro
content: Hehe, what an ignorant lady. Let me wake you up from your sweet dream!

name: Usopp
content: Don't touch Kaya! You'll need to beat me first!

name: Kuro
content: Ugh...I just wanted to stop being a pirate and live a peaceful life...

name: Kaya
content: Thank you, Usopp. Thank you, everyone.

name: Usopp
content: That's nothing, haha. I am the great Captain Usopp!

name: Merry
content: This is a small gift from me. Thank you!

name: Kaya
content: Food and some necessities are already on the ship.

name: Luffy
content: (Admiring) Wow, this ship is so cool, especially the bow...
What's the name of the ship?

name: Kaya
content: This ship is especially designed by Merry. The name is Going Merry!

name: Nami
content: (Admiring) Cool!
Usopp, off to the sea with us! You'll meet your father some day!

name: Usopp
content: (Crying) Okay...I'm the captain, right?

name: People
content: To the new ship and new member! Cheers!

name: Fullbody
content: Waiter, why is there an insect in my soup!

name: Sanji
content: Oh, let me just take out that out for you.

name: Sanji
content: By the way (smoking) I'm Sanji, the assistant head chef of this restaurant. Now here's your soup.

name: Fullbody
content: Do you know who I am? How can I have something like this! (Throws the soup to the ground)

name: Fullbody
content: Arrest this chef!

name: Marine officer
content: Yes, sir!

name: Fullbody
content: You brat, how dare you attack the Marines. Arrest them all!
Seems like we can't just stand by.

name: Fullbody
content: What are you doing! So this restaurant has been working with pirates! I'll finish you all with my own hands!

name: Sanji
content: Whoever messes with a chef in the middle of the sea, that person has committed suicide. Remember this!
The fierce battle has damaged many tables and chairs in the Baratie.

name: Nami
content: Alas, we must compensate a lot of money! My treasure...

name: Sanji
content: Nami is so cute!

name: Patty
content: (Humming) Today I have to treat them nicely. Customers are gods!

name: Patty
content: What is this...!!! A...a customer!? It's you again, Sanji!? What are you doing to our customer!

name: Sanji
content: Tut (smoking) So what? He just insulted the chef by playing with food.

name: Fullbody
content: What kind of restaurant treats customers like this...I will tell the Marines to destroy this place!

name: Sanji
content: You want to destroy this place? Well then, I can't let you live now.

name: Krieg
content: Sorry… Could you give me some food and water? Money is not a problem.

name: Gin
content: Mr. Sanji...I know I shouldn't come back. But please, save our captain. Or he'll die!

name: Patty
content: This is impossible. He's Krieg. If he regains his strength, he'll destroy us! We must contact the Marines now!

name: Sanji
content: Get out of my way, Patty (Kicks Patty aside and brings a plate of fried rice)! Give this to him, Gin!
After finishing the rice, Krieg beats Sanji and tries to occupy Baratie.

name: Gin
content: You...What about the promise! Captain Krieg! That man just saved our lives!

name: Krieg
content: This feeling is really great! It's a very nice restaurant. So I'll take it!

name: Patty
content: What! How can you do this! Look what you've done, Sanji!

name: Krieg
content: Prepare 100 servings of food! I have many starving crewmen!

name: Zeff
content: Here you go...Take this to your crew...

name: Patty
content: Zeff! What do you mean! If we give the pirates food, they'll take our restaurant!

name: Zeff
content: That will depend on their spirit...Isn't that right? Fugitives from the Grand Line!

name: Krieg
content: Zeff...You are Zeff the Red Leg!

name: Krieg
content: I heard that you got into an accident. Though you're still alive, you lost your leg!

name: Krieg
content: Excellent, I want to have your journal of the Grand Line!

name: Zeff
content: My journal… It's too much for someone like you.

name: Sanji
content: Zeff, step back, leave it to me!

name: Krieg
content: Hey, Gin, you deal with that chef!

name: Gin
content: Captain...I can't do this...

name: Sanji
content: Gin?

name: Gin
content: Captain Krieg, this is too much!

name: Krieg
content: This is an order from your captain!

name: Gin
content: Sorry, Sanji.
Krieg takes the food back to his ship.

name: Gin
content: Sanji… I'm so sorry! I never thought that it would turn out like this, I...

name: Zeff
content: Hey! You don't need to apologize. Every chef here does what they want for their own sake.

name: Patty
content: Boss, you're still protecting Sanji… but those pirates want to destroy our restaurant!

name: Zeff
content: Shut up, you idiot! (Angry) Have you even been through a situation where you had no food to eat and no water to drink? Have you ever known the suffering of being without food or drink in the middle of the sea?

name: Patty
content: Eh… what do you mean, Boss?

name: Zeff
content: I don't have time to talk about this. If you have time, why don't you just get out of here through the back door?

name: Patty
content: I will stay here and fight! This place is where I work!

name: Gin
content: What...What are you thinking! Krieg will come with his ship soon. You'd better get out of here!

name: Sanji
content: (Smoking) I must tell you that it is my duty as a chef to give food to starving people.

name: Sanji
content: But if the man dares to take this restaurant (angry), even you, I will kill that person without mercy!! Understand?

name: Luffy
content: See? He's a good man, right?

name: Usopp
content: I don't care bout him! We'd better get out of here first!

name: Luffy
content: By the way, Gin, you told us you went to the Grand Line once. Tell us something!

name: Gin
content: (In Pain) I still can't believe what happened to us… A man suddenly appeared in the sea...and destroyed a fleet of 50 ships by himself!

name: Crowds
content: What… No way! Only one person did that?

name: Gin
content: I don't know whether the other ships made it or not. When we saw the man's eyes, we felt that we were dead already. I don't want to think about it...

name: Zoro
content: What!?

name: Zeff
content: No doubt, that had to be the work of the Hawk-Eye.

name: Usopp
content: Hawk...Hawk-Eye? Who is that?

name: Luffy
content: (Absent minded) Dunno...

name: Zoro
content: He's the man I'm looking for. Well, my destination seems clear. I'm going to the Grand Line!
Krieg came back to Baratie with his men who had eaten all the food.

name: Krieg
content: Pearl, finish these annoying ones first.

name: Usopp
content: Don't come closer! I am Captain Usopp with a crew of 80 million!

name: Pearl
content: Oh, really? Then I'll start with you!

name: Pearl
content: What is this? Blood...Blood! Ahhhhhhhh!!!

name: Luffy
content: What's going on? Is he mad?
Whatever. Let's finish him, Luffy!

name: Krieg
content: Useless trash. Shall I finish you myself?

name: Krieg's follower
content: Captain, they are strong...They don't seem like ordinary pirates...

name: Krieg
content: What did you say?

name: Krieg's follower
content: No...Nothing

name: Sanji
content: Bring it on! I'll protect this restaurant!
Well, we're already involved in this mess. Let's fight together!

name: Krieg
content: You won't beat me!
A mysterious man showed up just as the battle on Baratie ended.

name: Gin
content: It's him! The one who destroyed our fleet!

name: Patty
content: What? He looks like a normal guy… and it doesn't seem like he's carrying any special weapons...

name: Zeff
content: The weapon is on his back! And he is the most renowned swordsman in the world… People call him "Hawk-Eyes" Mihawk!

name: Zoro
content: No wonder you are the  strongest...You cut 50 ships with one swords? I set sail to meet you!

name: Hawk Eye
content: Oh? What do you aim for?

name: Zoro
content: To be the strongest! You're free, right? So let's have a duel!

name: Hawk Eye
content: Ignorant weakling...I don't need to draw out my sword to see the clear difference between you and I.

name: Zoro
content: This is my ambition...and a promise to a friend!

name: Hawk Eye
content: Hehe...ambition? I can just use this small blade. Now then, show me your ambition!

name: Hawk Eye
content: Why do you refuse to step back?

name: Zoro
content: (Laugh) I'd much rather die than step back!

name: Hawk Eye
content: Kid, tell me your name!

name: Zoro
content: Roronoa Zoro.

name: Hawk Eye
content: Good. You are definitely not an ordinary swordsman. And to pay my respect to you as a fellow swordsman, I shall end your life with my black sword, the world's strongest sword!
Realizing his defeat, Zoro spread his arms and faces Hawk-Eye with his chest.

name: Hawk Eye
content: Kid, what do you think you're doing?

name: Zoro
content: A wound on one's back is the shame of a swordsman!!
Zoro!!!

name: Hawk Eye
content: A friend of the swordsman? Relax, that man... is still alive.

name: Usopp
content: Zoro! Hurry! Somebody save him!

name: Hawk Eye
content: Be strong, Roronoa Zoro! I shall stand at the top of the world and wait for you!  Try to surpass me!

name: Hawk Eye
content: (Turns to face Luffy) Boy, what do you aim for?

name: Luffy
content: Pirate King!

name: Hawk Eye
content: A tough path indeed. Even tougher than surpassing me!

name: Luffy
content: I'm going to be the Pirate King even if it costs me my life!
Zoro wakes up and raises his sword.

name: Zoro
content: Can you hear me?
Zoro...

name: Zoro
content: Sorry for worrying you...-0- . I...If I don't become the world's greatest swordsman, it will embarrass you.

name: Luffy
content: Zoro! Please don't talk any more. You're still bleeding!

name: Zoro
content: I'm never...going to lose again!! (Crying) Until the day I become the world's greatest swordsman, I'll never lose again!! Any problems, Pirate King?!

name: Hawk Eye
content: Hehe, Zoro. You make a good team. I'd like to see you again sometime in the Grand Line.
At this point, a noise comes out from the restaurant. Patty rushes out.

name: Patty
content: Bad...bad news! Nami has gone to Cocoyasi Village with the Going Merry!
Usopp, Arlong Park is around there, right? Nami must be heading there.

name: Usopp
content: Yep. Those chefs saw Nami taking Arlong's wanted poster and left.
Ah...Nami's really good at picking places...

name: Fishman Pirate
content: Who are you! How dare you come to Arlong Park!

name: Usopp
content: Shoot, there are guards!
You! Answer me, is Nami in Arlong Park?

name: Fishman Pirate
content: Ye...Yes. Nami is inside…
Let's hurry and find Nami.

name: Kuroobi
content: Wait, where are you going? I can't let you in unless you tell me what are you up to!

name: Luffy
content: Where is Nami?

name: Kuroobi
content: So you're here for that human. I won't let you in!

name: Luffy
content: Nami, hurry, come with me!

name: Nami
content: You...why are you here?
We're here for you. You're our navigator!

name: Nami
content: I won't leave with you. I have my reasons to stay here! You should leave now. Arlong will come back soon.
The reason you staying here is you want to protect the village. We'll help you defeat Arlong and his men.

name: Nami
content: Who needs your help? Hurry up and leave! (Nami runs away)

name: Hatchan
content: You are not Arlong's guests. Who are you?
We're pirates!

name: Hatchan
content: And you, green hair, you must be pirate hunter Roronoa Zoro. I'll let you taste my six swords!

name: Zoro
content: Hmph, bring it on!

name: Hatchan
content: Come on, guys!

name: Hatchan
content: Roronoa Zoro, you can't kill me. Because I have 6 arms!

name: Zoro
content: You octopus!
Zoro! Your injury hasn't healed yet! Don't push yourself too hard!

name: Hatchan
content: You want to pretend you're sick? I won't be fooled. Let me show you my true strength!

name: Luffy
content: So you're Arlong?

name: Arlong
content: Boy, you still don't know who am I?
Luffy sends Arlong flying.

name: Luffy
content: Don't you dare make my navigator cry!

name: Fishman Pirate
content: You brat, how could you beat captain Arlong!

name: Sanji
content: Ahah, you shouldn't hog all the glory for yourself.

name: Zoro
content: They won't lose without you.

name: Sanji
content: What did you say, seaweed head!

name: Zoro
content: What? You spiral eyebrow!

name: Fishman Pirate
content: How dare you ignore us!

name: Usopp
content: I...I don't particularly mind if you want so, Luffy...

name: Zoro
content: You sure are brave.

name: Chew
content: Eh? That long-nose is still alive? You should be dead!

name: Usopp
content: Want to beat me? Stop dreaming!

name: Nami
content: Damn...Damn...Damn!

name: Arlong
content: Your money is stolen? That's quite unfortunate of you. But a promise is a promise. You have to pay me 100 million beli again.

name: Nami
content: You vile monster...

name: Arlong
content: Shahahaha. It's only 100 million beli. All you need to do is to save up that much again!
Damn. Let go of Nami!

name: Nami
content: (Cry)-0-…Luffy...every one...sorry. Help me!
Of course we will help you!
How dare you make our navigator cry!

name: Arlong
content: You think you can beat me? Have a try!
Luffy, Zoro, every one!

name: Nojiko
content: Hey, Nami, why not come back and live with us?

name: Nami
content: Hehheh. -0-, take off now!

name: Usopp
content: Ah, what's the hurry?
Going Merry left Cocoyasi Village. Nami reveals that she stole all of the money from the village.

name: Nami
content: Goodbye, everyone! I'll be off now!

name: Genzo
content: You thieving cat!

name: Nojiko
content: I should have known better from my own sister.

name: Tashigi
content: Pirate hunter Roronoa Zoro. To think you're now a pirate. I'm going to arrest you!

name: Zoro
content: And you are?

name: Tashigi
content: I am Sergeant Tashigi. You don't deserve the named sword, Sungdai Kitetsu!

name: Zoro
content: Oh? Then have a try.

name: Tashigi
content: Attention, arrest all the pirates!

name: Marine
content: Yes, Sergeant Tashigi!
That was close. Loguetown really has high security!

name: Nami
content: We should avoid problems.

name: Zoro
content: These guys can't even stand a single blow!

name: Usopp
content: Be careful, we've been exposed. And that Marine girl is chasing us.

name: Tashigi
content: There you are!

name: Tashigi
content: Roronoa Zoro, I will defeat you with my own hands!

name: Zoro
content: You go first. Leave it to me!

name: Tashigi
content: Roronoa Zoro! Don't you dare run away!

name: Zoro
content: Don't you understand? You can't defeat me!

name: Mohji
content: Aren't they with that rubber boy? He's going to be executed by Captain Buggy.

name: Mohji
content: Go Richie! Bite them!

name: Richie
content: Grrr!
They're indeed the Buggy Pirates.

name: Usopp
content: We must save Luffy!
Lucky, we can see Luffy already.

name: Luffy
content: I'm so excited!

name: Alvida
content: Aren't you -0- and Luffy?
Who are you?

name: Sanji
content: -0-, how do know such pretty lady!
I don't remember knowing someone this pretty.

name: Alvida
content: How could you forget? You were the first man to ever hit me. I am the beautiful lady Alvida!
Ah, how'd you change so much? Did you eat a devil fruit?

name: Alvida
content: Hehe… The devil fruit I ate is the Slip-Slip Fruit. Now, it's time for me to take revenge by cutting off your head!

name: Buggy the Clown
content: Gyahahahaha. You should be proud of dying in the same place as the Pirate King!

name: Buggy the Clown
content: Guilty! Pirate Monkey D. Luffy, for the crime of angering me…

name: Buggy the Clown
content: I sentence you to a flashy execution!!

name: Luffy
content: Wow, this is the first time I've seen an execution.

name: Buggy the Clown
content: Hey, you're the one who's being executed here!

name: Luffy
content: What! Are you kidding me!

name: Buggy the Clown
content: No! You're the one joking around!

name: Buggy the Clown
content: Anyway… Any last words? There's quite a crowd here.

name: Buggy the Clown
content: Well, whatever. Whether you have any last words or not, no one would care about.

name: Luffy
content: I'm the man who'll become the Pirate King!!!

name: Smoker
content: Hey, what are you doing here in my territory? Capture them!

name: Marine
content: Yes, sir!
Let's head back to the Going Merry!

name: Luffy
content: There's going to be a big fight here!

name: Smoker
content: Trying to run away, Straw Hat Luffy? No pirate has ever gotten away from me in Loguetown.

name: Smoker
content: I won't let you escape from here!

name: Luffy
content: What?! Ahh!

name: Smoker
content: You finally ran out of luck.
I don't think so!

name: Smoker
content: What!?
Now, Luffy, hurry!
It begins raining heavily with strong winds.

name: Nami
content: Hurry up, let's leave under the cover of the rain!

name: Usopp
content: I'll go prepare the ship!

name: Smoker
content: I won't let you get away so easily! Catch them!
-0- and others successfully escaped. However, they've caught the eye of Smoker.
So everyone has decided to go to an island and find a doctor to cure Nami first.

name: Luffy
content: Wow! An island!!

name: Luffy
content: It's white. So it must be a snow island!

name: Sanji
content: Hey, Luffy, I must tell you that we won't have time to play.

name: Sanji
content: We have to find doctor to cure Nami and then set sail again.

name: Luffy
content: Snow is so beautiful.
He didn't hear a single word... Everyone get ready!

name: Dalton
content: Don't move, pirates!

name: Luffy
content: Hey, there are people here.

name: Usopp
content: They don't look friendly.

name: Dalton
content: Get off of this island...now!

name: Luffy
content: We're looking for a doctor!

name: Vivi
content: We have a sick person on board!

name: Guard
content: That trick won't work, you evil pirates!

name: Guard
content: This is our country, and we won't let you in!

name: Guard
content: Get out, or we'll shoot you!

name: Sanji
content: They act as if they've hated us for a long time.

name: Dalton
content: Cut the crap. I won't let you enter!

name: Usopp
content: What are you doing!

name: Sanji
content: Are you trying to mess with us?

name: Vivi
content: Stop, Sanji! Aaah!
While Vivi was try to stop Sanji, she was hurt by a bullet.

name: Luffy
content: Vivi!! How dare you!!!

name: Guard
content: Get ready!!

name: Vivi
content: Wait, Luffy, don't fight them! I'm ok. The bullet missed me.

name: Vivi
content: If you fight them, we may all get hurt. What will happen to Nami then?

name: Luffy
content: I'm sorry...It's my fault!! Please call a doctor. Please help my friend.
Luffy and Vivi get down on their knees

name: Dalton
content: (Shocked)...

name: Dalton
content: I...will show you the way to our village. Follow me!

name: Kuromarimo
content: Dr. Kureha, how dare you stay in the castle while we're away!

name: Dr. Kureha
content: Heeheeheehee...I have no interest in this shabby castle. But he...

name: Dr. Kureha
content: He wants to have Hiluluk's cemetery here.

name: Kuromarimo
content: Lord Wapol, he's that monster!

name: Chopper
content: Doctor just wanted to help this country! That's why I can't allow you to get into the castle!

name: Chopper
content: I will never allow anyone to take doctor's faith down from here!!

name: Wapol
content: Maaahahahaha, if all of you wanted to die, why didn't you just ask? I'll kill you all!

name: Kuromarimo
content: How dare you to use this sacred castle as that charlatan's cemetery! Watch out, Electric Marimo!

name: Chopper
content: Get out of this country!!

name: Wapol
content: Get out of the way, Chess! (Wapol opens his mouth, trying to swallow Chopper)

name: Sanji
content: Look out!

name: Dr. Kureha
content: Chopper!

name: Sanji
content: Luffy, grab my leg now!

name: Luffy
content: Your leg? Like this?

name: Sanji
content: Ok, don't let go. [Air Force - Rubber Shot]!
Sanji kicks Luffy towards Wapol and saves Chopper from being swallowed.

name: Wapol
content: Ugh!!

name: Sanji
content: Phew...not bad at all.

name: Wapol
content: I'll kill them all! I'll show them the power of the Munch-Munch Fruit!!

name: Zoro
content: Luffy, what are you doing at the top of the castle?

name: Luffy
content: I just kicked that king away.

name: Dalton
content: So...the thing that just flew away is Wapol!

name: Zoro
content: How about the other two?

name: Luffy
content: That reindeer has beaten them down! Hey, listen up, I found a new crew member!

name: Dalton
content: Reindeer...beat them down? Anyway, thank you very much! I'm sure Drum Kingdom will become better from now on!

name: Luffy
content: Reindeer! Let's set sail together!!

name: Chopper
content: I...thank you. But I can't go with you!

name: Chopper
content: Because...I am a reindeer! I have hooves and horns! I also have a blue nose!

name: Chopper
content: Though I want to be a pirate... But I can't be friends with humans! I'm a monster!

name: Chopper
content: So...I...only want to say thank you for asking me!

name: Luffy
content: Just shut up and come with us!!!

name: MR.3
content: Welcome to my Candle Feast!

name: Nami
content: There's something turning around over our heads.

name: Zoro
content: Feels like the candle on a cake.

name: Nami
content: I can't move my legs...

name: Vivi
content: Something's falling from above… what is that?

name: MR.3
content: Hahaha! How's the taste of my Candle Feast?

name: MR.3
content: The candle mist that falls from above will soon turn you into candle toys!

name: MR.3
content: Die for the sake of my art, you should feel honored!

name: Nami
content: No way! Why should I die for your art?

name: Luffy
content: Usopp...don't you think these people are unforgivable?

name: Usopp
content: Sure. I'll finish them...

name: Luffy
content: Good! Let's go together and crush all of them!!

name: Sanji
content: It seems like I have to defeat this okama if I want to get by...

name: MR.2
content: Show all your skills… because I've trained hard everyday!

name: MR.2
content: There's no one can crush my Okama Kenpo!

name: Sanji
content: Damn that okama bastard... I even used the Mutton Shot...

name: MR.2
content: Stop joking around! I even used the Swan Wind Wing Open against that loser chef...

name: MR.2
content: I'm being serious from now on!

name: Sanji
content: Just go ahead...

name: MR.2
content: I...I lost...

name: Sanji
content: What? If you change into Nami now, I wouldn't be able to kill you.

name: MR.2
content: Ha...How funny...I can't even move now.

name: MR.2
content: You win! Kill me now! My life will be ended by the organization any way...

name: MR.2
content: What are you waiting for? Hurry and finish me off!!

name: Sanji
content: That was a good fight. The rest doesn't really need to be said...

name: Vivi
content: Kohza!!

name: Kohza
content: Am I seeing things?!

name: Kohza
content: I came here...to persuade the Royal Army.

name: Kohza
content: Why would the king nearly get killed by the hero of the country? I...I won't believe this...

name: Vivi
content: Kohza, in fact...

name: Kohza
content: The person who took away the rain from this country---who the hell is he?

name: Vivi
content: It was all...

name: Crocodile
content: Me. Kohza! Everything you thought the king did was done by me!

name: Crocodile
content: It would be better if you hadn't known about this.

name: Crocodile
content: Cause you would have died much easier. Kuhahaha!

name: Kohza
content: Crocodile!!

name: Zoro
content: Your body is hard to cut...It's not normal...

name: MR.1
content: Yes...I ate the Dice-Dice Fruit...and become a Blade Man!

name: MR.1
content: The man who defeated 100 men in the Whiskey Peak is you, right?

name: MR.1
content: The man who refused to join Baroque Works and killed Mr.7 is also you, right?

name: Zoro
content: Ha...That is a long time ago.

name: Zoro
content: But that was all your fault. Why didn't you accept my condition?

name: Zoro
content: I said to that agent "I'll join you if you made me the boss",

name: Zoro
content: But that guy didn't agree and attacked me. So I had to kill him.

name: Zoro
content: Are you going to persuade me? Tell your boss to get lost.

name: MR.1
content: Don't look down upon others! You are just a pirate swordsman!

name: MR.1
content: In this battle, he grew so much...

name: MR.1
content: Next time...Are you going to cut through diamonds?

name: Zoro
content: I don't know yet...

name: MR.1
content: Haha...I accept my failure...

name: Luffy
content: I caught up! Crocodile!

name: Crocodile
content: Why are you still alive? Why do you come back every time I kill you!

name: Crocodile
content: Why? Straw hat?

name: Crocodile
content: How many times do I need to kill you?

name: Luffy
content: Because you still haven't returned something you took away.

name: Crocodile
content: The thing I took away? Is it money, fame, life, or rain? Do you want me to give back?

name: Luffy
content: It's the country!

name: Crocodile
content: Country? Don't be ridiculous. I've just obtained this country, and soon I'll be the king to rule this land!

name: Luffy
content: From the time we came here, her country was already gone.

name: Luffy
content: If this is truly her country… why does she never laugh?

name: Crocodile
content: You look like you really want to defeat me.

name: Crocodile
content: Then I have to regard you as a real enemy!

name: Luffy
content: Really....

name: Crocodile
content: This is the last time. We'll battle it out!
After successfully defeating Crocodile, everyone decide to meet Vivi at the Eastern coast---

name: Zoro
content: Let's go, it's almost time...

name: Luffy
content: She's definitely coming. I'll look for her!

name: Usopp
content: Hey, bad news! The marines caught up with us again!

name: Zoro
content: How many are there? Let's sail now.

name: Sanji
content: Forget it, Luffy. She's not the same Vivi that was with us now.

name: Luffy
content: (Not convinced) ...

name: Vivi
content: Everyone!!!!

name: Luffy
content: (Excited) Vivi!!

name: Vivi
content: I'm here to say goodbye...

name: Vivi
content: Sorry, but I can't go with you! Thank you all for what you have done for me!

name: Vivi
content: Even though I still want to go with you, but right now I can't.

name: Vivi
content: Because I really love my country!! So I can't come along!

name: Luffy
content: ...Really?!

name: Vivi
content: Even though I...I decided to stay here, but...

name: Vivi
content: But if there's one day we meet each other again, will you still take me as a friend?

name: Luffy
content: You're always....

name: Nami
content: We shouldn't answer her. The marines already noticed Vivi...

name: Nami
content: Let's just part quietly...
Everyone raises their left arm to reveal the sign of their friendship!
Let's sail!!
After leaving Alabasta, the journey to Skypiea has started. However, no one knows where Skypiea is. Therefore, they decide to go to Mock Town and look for some information first.

name: Salvage King Masira
content: Listen to me, every sunken ship around here is mine!
We're not here to salvage. ..

name: Salvage King Masira
content: Then you're after the gold? I won't let!

name: Salvage King Masira
content: Don't mess with me in my territory!

name: Luffy
content: We don't have time to talk with you, you monkey!

name: Zoro
content: Humph…

name: Sanji
content: Get out of the way! (Kick Masira away)

name: Luffy
content: Another weirdo?

name: Sonar King Shoujou
content: How dare you hurt our father!!

name: Sonar King Shoujou
content: Jeez...and I thought it was somebody dangerous. It was making me a little bit edgy.

name: Luffy
content: You have a very strange face. What species are you?

name: Sonar King Shoujou
content: I'm a human! You punk!

name: Sonar King Shoujou
content: You really don't know how strong I am?

name: Sonar King Shoujou
content: Ever since I was born, I have never had a hair cut. That's 25 years without a haircut! Did I surprise you?

name: Zoro
content: Don't talk nonsense with him. Let me finish him.

name: Cricket
content: You're all after the gold, right? Go die!

name: Sanji
content: Whoa!

name: Chopper
content: Sanji! AHHHHHH!

name: Sanji
content: Don't worry. He missed! Hey, wait a minute!

name: Zoro
content: You idiot, that's what you get for taking him on. Uh?
Cricket suddenly fell to the ground, twitching.

name: Sanji
content: Hey!?

name: Luffy
content: Bellamy, where are you!

name: Bellamy
content: Calling for me like that… We were just talking about you. Do you have something to say to me?

name: Luffy
content: Yes. Return diamond-head mister's gold back to him!

name: Bellamy
content: Gold? You mean Cricket's treasure?

name: Bellamy
content: I shouldn't have to do that. It's my loot as a pirate.

name: Bellamy
content: You're a pirate too. You don't have the right to say stuff like that to me.

name: Luffy
content: Yes, I do! They're my friends. So I will take the gold back to them!

name: Bellamy
content: Hahahahah! Can you fight? Do you know how to punch? Hahahah!

name: Bellamy
content: If you stand here like an idiot just like in the morning, you won't be able to take anything from me, wimp!

name: Luffy
content: What happened in the morning is a different matter.

name: Bellamy
content: This time, I'll beat you up until you won't ever have the chance to bluff like that again!

name: Bellamy
content: Golden City, Sky Island… The age for daydreams is over!

name: Luffy
content: You asked if I know how to punch, right?

name: Bellamy
content: Farewell! Straw hat!
Boom! One hit KO against Bellamy!

name: Luffy
content: Look, that man fell off his horse.

name: Doc Q
content: Excuse me, can you two help me up...?

name: Zoro
content: You just don't want to pick yourself up, right?

name: Doc Q
content: Ah, sorry, I have been weak physically since childhood...

name: Luffy
content: Even the horse is weak...

name: Doc Q
content: A token of my gratitude… please have an apple...

name: Zoro
content: No thanks… Just hurry up and leave...

name: Luffy
content: Ah! Apples! Thanks!

name: Zoro
content: Hey! Hey! Luffy, Don't eat them!
A sound of explosion came from afar. Someone exploded after they ate an apple.

name: Zoro
content: What are you trying to pull here?!

name: Doc Q
content: Hahah...Cough...Don't worry...He's fine. If he took the wrong one, he would have been dead on the first bite.

name: Doc Q
content: That kid is safe… Haha… Cough… You're really lucky!

name: Blackbeard
content: You are… a pirate?

name: Luffy
content: Yes!

name: Blackbeard
content: Bounty?

name: Luffy
content: 30 million!

name: Blackbeard
content: 30 million? You...? You're lying!

name: Luffy
content: I'm not lying! It's true!

name: Zoro
content: Knock it off!

name: Blackbeard
content: Hey… Don't fight in the bar!

name: Luffy
content: Go ahead!

name: Ohm
content: You're the third one to get here today.

name: Chopper
content: I… I was too full of myself!——I should go back first! Now I'm dead!

name: Ohm
content: Don't be so afraid. That dog's name is Holy. He is my pet… He won't bite you.

name: Chopper
content: B… But this man is covered in blood!

name: Ohm
content: That man was chopped by me.

name: Chopper
content: That's even worse! Who are you!?

name: Ohm
content: My name is Ohm… You should be quiet… Right now, I'm...

name: Ohm
content: Busy feeling sorrowful for these mortals. Life is nothing but a dream..

name: Ohm
content: Why are they in such a hurry to die in a battle?

name: Chopper
content: Huh? What...?

name: Ohm
content: People live for prosperity, yet for prosperity they fight and die...

name: Ohm
content: Thus, wouldn't it be better if they hadn't done anything to begin with?

name: Ohm
content: Oh sorrow... But, there's still a way to salvation...

name: Ohm
content: All they need to do is to die!!

name: Chopper
content: This guy is a super psycho!

name: Ohm
content: Why are you here?

name: Chopper
content: I...I'm here to find gold...

name: Ohm
content: If you want that, you must fight. (Pulls out a sword) Allow me to save you.

name: Chopper
content: I don't want to be saved by you!

name: Shura
content: First you tell me not to attack your friends, then you tell me not to destroy this ship...

name: Shura
content: Then you say you don't want to die...

name: Shura
content: You selfish animal, you really piss me off.

name: Shura
content: Why are you so weak!

name: Chopper
content: Whoa! Stop… That lance burns stuff!

name: Shura
content: You want to live without any sacrifice?

name: Shura
content: If someone wants to survive… then someone else must die… This is reality...

name: Shura
content: You must give your life to god!

name: Chopper
content: No!
When Chopper is about to be hit by Shura, Knight of the Sky Gan Fall appears!

name: Gan Fall
content: Thanks for waiting!

name: Chopper
content: Knight of the Sky!!

name: Shura
content: Gan Fall! Huh… A rare guest!

name: Gan Fall
content: Let's fight harder, Pierre.

name: Shura
content: Old men like you are useless! Let's play with him, Fuza!

name: Satori
content: Huhuhuhu! Welcome to my Ordeal of Balls!

name: Luffy
content: This is your Ordeal of Balls? Are you a ball?

name: Satori
content: Hoh hoh hooooo

name: Sanji
content: Stop dancing! Who are you?

name: Usopp
content: Looks like another idiot...

name: Sanji
content: Hey, Octopus, are Nami and the others alright?

name: Satori
content: I don't care...They'll probably die anyway.

name: Sanji
content: What did you say!!

name: Satori
content: You should worry about yourselves. If you can't beat me, you can't move forward.

name: Usopp
content: He's coming, Luffy! Go kick his ass!

name: Luffy
content: Ok! I'll knock him down!

name: Gedatsu
content: Where did he disappear to? Does he has the ability to turn invisible...?

name: Chopper
content: Ah! He's making white eyes! So scary!

name: Priest Guardian
content: Gedatsu, if you do that eye thing, you can't see the enemy!

name: Gedatsu
content: Ah! I was careless!

name: Chopper
content: Is this guy an idiot? Enemy! Are you a… priest?

name: Gedatsu
content: (Bite lips) That's right! I am the Sky Boss Gedatsu!

name: Gedatsu
content: I am also one of the mighty Enel's priests!

name: Priest Guardian
content: Gedatsu! You have to say it loud!

name: Gedatsu
content: Hunh! Take a look at where you're standing! You're in my territory!

name: Gedatsu
content: Swamp clouds are planted everywhere. Once you're trapped by the swamp, you'll never get out!

name: Gedatsu
content: The survival rate is...

name: Luffy
content: Are you the bastard Enel?

name: Nami
content: Luffy!

name: Luffy
content: What did you do to my friends!

name: Enel
content: Show some respect… I am god!

name: Luffy
content: You don't look like god!

name: Enel
content: I hear the cheers of the party...

name: Enel
content: The citizens seem to know about the fate of Skypiea...Yahaha...

name: Enel
content: I wonder where are they running to?

name: Luffy
content: I said, you don't look like god!

name: Enel
content: I will show you soon enough.

name: Enel
content: I see… So you are not a simple mortal… However...

name: Enel
content: Paramecia type makes no difference to me!

name: Enel
content: Because... I am god!!

name: Enel
content: God's judgment! 100 million volts!!
Luffy was not hurt at all after being hit by the thunder.

name: Enel
content: What?

name: Nami
content: Immune to thunder? Can it be because of... his rubber body?

name: Luffy
content: Stop it, you are annoying! (Beat down Enel with one hit)

name: Nami
content: Thunder has no effect on Luffy!

name: Nami
content: The one man who can fight against thunder. Enel probably never thought that such a man existed!

name: Nami
content: Maybe Luffy is Enel's one and only natural enemy!

name: Foxy
content: Hey, that horse is mine. I shot it. Don't touch it!

name: Porche
content: Yeah! That's my boss's horse!

name: Luffy
content: (Angry) Who the hell… are you?

name: Foxy
content: Who am I? He actually doesn't recognize my face!!!

name: Usopp
content: Damn! Are they the shooters?

name: Luffy
content: I don't care about your face! But I'll kick your ass and send you flying!

name: Foxy
content: I am Foxy and I always get what I want!!

name: Luffy
content: You bastard!! "Rubber"…

name: Foxy
content: Hold it! Straw-hat Luffy?

name: Luffy
content: Eh? How do you know my name?

name: Foxy
content: We Foxy Pirates will challenge you Straw Hat pirates…

name: Foxy
content: ...to an official Davy Back Fight!

name: Luffy
content: What are you gabbling about? Just bring it on! If you want a fight, I accept it!

name: Porche
content: Better not go far away from the island if you don't want to get lost in the sea. Good Luck!

name: Nami
content: What does that mean? Who will do that?

name: Usopp
content: No, it isn't that simple (They are attacked from the shore)

name: Nami
content: How dirty, being stopped by the audience!

name: Porche
content: Ahaha…See ya!

name: Sanji
content: What do you want to do with my Nami? Damn! Bastard! I'll kick your head off!

name: Porche
content: Sinking their ship will be much easier.

name: Foxy
content: I have…a naughty idea. Fuehehehe… "White Smoke Attack".

name: Nami
content: This place is the maze of currents. If we find the right path, the current will take the ship forward.

name: Nami
content: Smoke is useless to us. See, that's the navigator!

name: Luffy
content: （Close to the finish line）Great! Nami and others are taking the lead!

name: Foxy
content: Slowmo Beam…

name: Porche
content: Thanks for your support. Our victory was guaranteed.

name: Foxy
content: Haha..Great! Now hand over one of your friends.

name: Foxy
content: The first crew I'd like to have is you - Doctor Tony Tony Chopper! (Chopper is taken away)

name: Zoro
content: Stop crying, Chopper!

name: Zoro
content: Be like a man! Sit tight and quietly watch the game.

name: Sanji
content: We still have two rounds. That's enough for us to get back our emergency ration.

name: Hamburg
content: Boss asks me to battle. I thought the opponent would be some tough guy.

name: Sanji
content: Who the hell are you?

name: Hamburg
content: Hahahaha, Gorilla Throw, Hamburger Hammer, Size Attack S-M-L! I win!

name: Sanji
content: In your dreams! I'm not done yet! It'll be a shame if I ask Zoro for help.

name: Hamburg
content: Heehee, ready ---(The groggy Monsters takes Sanji and Zoro Down)

name: Zoro
content: Hey… Chef, give me 10 seconds.

name: Sanji
content: 10 seconds? Not a problem. (Stands up)

name: Foxy
content: Hey, you, I'd like to have a "Monster Burger"

name: Hamburg
content: Hahaha, I'll smash you and make you a hamburger. Heehee, chop you into pieces like chopping vegetables!

name: Hamburg
content: Heehee, and finally flatter you with a huge iron pan. A "Monster Burger" is made.

name: Sanji
content: You can't make good food with such lousy skills! Anti-Manner Kick! (Win)

name: Foxy
content: Oh, not bad! We're enemies, yet you are still worth my respect. Come on!

name: Luffy
content: Rubber gun!

name: Foxy
content: Slowmo Beam!

name: Luffy
content: Ah, my hand is slowing down!

name: Foxy
content: What, are you all bark and no bite?

name: Luffy
content: Damn! His Slowmo Beam is harder to deal with than I thought.
(After an intense battle, Luffy and Foxy are on the deck. Luffy is taken down again and again but stands up every time)

name: Luffy
content: I'd rather die than give you my friends!

name: Foxy
content: What are you talking about!! I'll finish you off right away!

name: Luffy
content: I---will win!

name: Foxy
content: What nonsense are you talking about? You can barely stand up.

name: Foxy
content: However, if you want to go on, I will take you down until you're unable to stand up. Megaton Nine-Tails Rush!

name: Luffy
content: Rubber Gatling (Luffy uses a mirror shard in his hand to reflect the Slowmo Beam, which hits Foxy)

name: Foxy
content: Damn… Damn..you!

name: Kuzan
content: Great, shore. Please step back. Ice Age!

name: Luffy
content: Devil fruit!! The sea is frozen!

name: Robin
content: He's the logia-type.. Hie Hie Fruit user. This is the ability of a supreme admiral from Marine headquarter!

name: Kuzan
content: I'm just here…to see you Nico Robin…

name: Kuzan
content: You…better die here and now!

name: Luffy
content: Don't fight. I want a one-on-one fight with him. Let's settle this, just you and me!

name: Kuzan
content: Cool with me...but I have no ship to take my prisoners away, so I have to kill you.

name: Luffy
content: Rubber Bullet!!

name: Kuzan
content: Ice Age!! (Luffy is frozen)

name: Kuzan
content: I was cheated. I win, but I accepted your 1v1 battle..

name: Kuzan
content: so if I do anything to others.. I break the promise.

name: Kuzan
content: Isn’t it, captain? Or … you really think you can defeat me?

name: Kuzan
content: I have something to tell you. You will not be able to…cope with Nico Robin in the future.

name: Blueno
content: Seems like the report is not true. I really thought we only had lost 5 men.

name: Blueno
content: It's the first time in the history that some one is able to break into the world government. You won't stop, will you?

name: Luffy
content: Yes, unless I die! Robin is behind the door right? Back off, dumb ox!

name: Blueno
content: You --seem don't realize what you are doing now constitutes an international crime!

name: Luffy
content: What are you trying to say?

name: Blueno
content: You are numbered and too weak to fight against World Government.

name: Luffy
content: Back off!

name: Blueno
content: Fighting against us is useless.

name: Luffy
content: Maybe, but now it's different. I won't lose!

name: Luffy
content: I don't care about the world or the government---We are coming to get Robin back!

name: Blueno
content: Gear Two?! Evolved skill?!

name: Luffy
content: I'm so lucky to meet you here. Rubber---!

name: Blueno
content: You want to deliver something big? The bigger it is, the easier it is to avoid. Go ahead!

name: Luffy
content: Rubber Jet Rifle!!

name: Blueno
content: So fast... impossible…

name: Luffy
content: You're pretty strong. Then, let me show you something more interesting.
(Blueno falls down)

name: Luffy
content: Robin ~~~~~~~~~!!! I'm picking you up~~~~~~~~~~~!!!

name: Usopp
content: Sorry.. Sanji…

name: Sanji
content: It's ok. Everyone has both weaknesses and strengths. I'll get the key.

name: Sanji
content: Let me do what you are incapable of.

name: Jabra
content: Wahaha! Changed the opponent! But it won't make a difference!

name: Sanji
content: Analyze! You can do it. Robin will be saved as long as you are here.

name: Jabra
content: Wahahaha, better crush you. It's useless!

name: Sanji
content: Your iron mass skill is really troublesome!!

name: Jabra
content: Heehee!! Your kick is useless to me…

name: Sanji
content: We'll see! (Sanji gives an angry kick that sends Jabra away)

name: Sanji
content: It works, Jabra. Thanks for the key!! Bye!

name: Jabra
content: Wait, how foolish of you to think that you can steal the key and run away!

name: Jabra
content: Like a wolf, I'll chase you to exhaustion and then devour you!

name: Sanji
content: I didn't think I would run away, but I will not be killed, nor will I spare you!

name: Jabra
content: Spare me? Hahaha, worry about yourself!

name: Jabra
content: Better think about how to get away rather than think of that ominous woman!

name: Sanji
content: Haha! You won't laugh for long! Diable Jambe! The destructive power is as strong as the devil!

name: Jabra
content: Hot! My bones are blazing hot and feel like they're going to break! What kind of kick is that?

name: Sanji
content: It's made by a God and a Devil. A bit spicy, huh?

name: Nami
content: Get serious, ok? Are you going to lose your life to the so-called chivalry?

name: Sanji
content: I..I don't want to die… but I don't kick girls. I was brought up this way. So..

name: Sanji
content: So, I won't kick girls even it means it'll kill me…!!!

name: Nami
content: Idiot!!! I'll take care of that woman! You and your chivalry…

name: Kalifa
content: We meet again, huh?

name: Nami
content: Thunderbolt Tempo! ----?! What is it? The thunder was blocked.. And turned into bubbles!

name: Kalifa
content: If you can't figure it out… you won't win!

name: Nami
content: It turns into bubbles like soap… Could she have eaten the bubble-bubble fruit?

name: Kalifa
content: Even if…you figure it out, you are doomed to lose!!

name: Nami
content: Is it useful in a fight? Looks weak!!

name: Kalifa
content: Don't forget, I'm still a killer for the assassin group. My nickname is "Golden Bubble"!

name: Nami
content: I can't even hold my Climate Baton… my legs are mushy… I can't stand up…!!

name: Kalifa
content: If you want to stop that monster, go ahead, but my mission is to kill you. Bow to your fate!

name: Nami
content: Climate Baton "Cloudy Tempo"——Rain and Cloud Combo!

name: Nami
content: I've seen through your ability including your CP9 power, so --- Electric Bubble!

name: Kalifa
content: Even if you can control the weather, so what? Six Powers are beyond the human extremity!

name: Nami
content: No matter how strong you are, my weather forecast won't fail me. My friends are waiting for me. If I were you, I would take it.

name: Kaku
content: Anyway, I said I like meat!

name: Zoro
content: I don't give a shit on what you like. Give me the key. If I can't catch up, I lose.

name: Kaku
content: Are you stronger with that headscarf on?

name: Zoro
content: Who knows？

name: Kaku
content: （Turns into a square）Iron mass without dead ends!  Square without dead ends!

name: Zoro
content: Shut up! What are you doing, bastard? Are you gonna fight or not?

name: Kaku
content: Where are you staring at? Have a taste of my attack!

name: Zoro
content: Er? Slashes! Damn! Santoryu!

name: Kaku
content: What power!

name: Zoro
content: If you're always look at things above, you won't notice what it's like being  beaten down… You hold your head too high!

name: Kaku
content: There's more you don't see. Giraffe's Wild Power!

name: Zoro
content: Show me!

name: Kaku
content: Thanks for the reminder. Giraffe Fort---

name: Zoro
content: What kind of creature are you?

name: Kaku
content: Tempest Kick Sky Slicer! Give up! You have nowhere to flee!

name: Zoro
content: It's you who should give up! Demon Aura Nine Sword Style --- Asura! (Kaku is defeated)

name: Zoro
content: Ah, right! The boss of Galley-La Company asked me to give you a message - "You're fired!"

name: Rob Lucci
content: Did you forget, Straw-hat Luffy? I gave you a blow with this stance back in the Galley-La Company...

name: Luffy
content: Oh, that! I recovered after eating some meat. Jet Bazooka --- Frankie, go save Robin!

name: Rob Lucci
content: …I should have been more careful. Never expected you have such great power.

name: Rob Lucci
content: But you look like you're out of breath. Is that because of the steam?

name: Luffy
content: I don't care what it takes, as long as I can defeat you!

name: Rob Lucci
content: What happened… how scary.

name: Rob Lucci
content: So it is… Indeed, your physical ability has been boosted.

name: Rob Lucci
content: But your body can't bear it. You are risking your life!

name: Luffy
content: Compared with losing something important, I'd rather bear it myself!!

name: Luffy
content: If there's something that I can do, I will do it!

name: Rob Lucci
content: Get all of them out? What a pathetic wish! Show me!

name: Rob Lucci
content: (Smash the wall) Soon the room will filled with water. You must be worried about them. Go save them!

name: Luffy
content: I won't let you go!!! They will live through no matter how difficult it may be!

name: Luffy
content: If I let you go, you'll go and kill them!

name: Rob Lucci
content: That's honorable, but it won't change anything if you die. Can you defeat me?

name: Luffy
content: Want a head-on battle? OK, let me show you another skill ---

name: Luffy
content: Gear Three---Bone Balloon! Check out my left hand! (Sends Rob Lucci flying)
